_doc: Force-push to main is HALT-AND-REPORT, not block, per hook-output-discipline.md MUST-2 (force-push is a LEXICAL signal → cannot carry block; the GitHub server-side rejection is the structural defense). validate-bash-command.js exits 0 with { continue:true, hookSpecificOutput:{validation} }. The guard MUST forward the tool (allow=true) AND surface the validation message — mirroring CC's continue:true + surfaced-message so the Codex agent receives the same advisory a CC agent does. Reclassified from the pre-MUST-2 block behavior (expected_allow was false) per #442.
